calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Release Of Mechanics Lien (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM SERENBETZ MOTION FOR RELEASE OF MECHANICS LIEN (MOTIONS) is GRANTED. The subject property is ordered released from the claim of lien. (Code Civ. Proc., section 8488(b).) Petitioner's request for attorney fees is GRANTED and may file motion requesting an amount.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Releasing Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance

Wesley Guzman, Esq., Cirrus Law PC, 625-463-1073, in-person appearance for plaintiff
No other appearances

Mr. Guzman contests the tentative. The Court states that proof of service must be filed 5 days prior to the hearing. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WILLIAM SERENBETZ MOTION / NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file for the Petition or the Motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
